text.title: Cross-Platform Token Distribution Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: author-canonical
step.action: Edit only tokens.json; structure: primitive → semantic → component.

step.name: configure-style-dictionary
step.action: Author config.json with transforms per platform.

step.name: run-transform
step.action: Style Dictionary build emits per-platform bundles.

step.name: ci-lint-drift
step.action: CI detects hand-edits in dist/*; fails the PR.

step.name: release
step.action: Tag version; publish per-platform packages (npm, Swift Package, Maven).
